Package in.co.rays.proj4.util

Class HTMLUtility

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.util.HTMLUtility
public class HTMLUtility extends Object
Utility class to dynamically generate structural HTML component fragments, such as drop-down selection input boxes (`` drop-down layout block

  • getList

    public static String getList(String name, String selectedVal, List list)
    Generates an HTML selective dropdown component list string powered by a generic List containing elements implementing the DropdownListBean contract.
    Parameters:
    name - the semantic 'name' parameter value identifier applied onto the select element
    selectedVal - the default value matching matching element keys that should map with an initial 'selected' markup status
    list - the source dynamic list data array holding elements mapping key-value criteria signatures
    Returns:
    a string containing the complete structural raw HTML `
